title: Da Lat、Lam Dong — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Da Lat、Lam Dongの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Da LatはLam Dongにある人口400,000の都市です。Vietnam’s hill station escape, known for its cool year-round climate, French colonial villas, flower gardens, and a romantic atmosphere that draws both tourists and expats.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
